    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideosPage() {\n...\nfunction VideosPage() {\n  // 管理删除对话框\n ...\n {\n    try {\n      setIsLoading(true)\n      console.log(\"开始获取视频列表数据，页码：\", page)\n      \n      const response = await videoApi.getVideos({\n        size: pageSize,\n        page: page\n      })\n      \n      console.log(\"获取视频列表响应:\", response)\n      \n      if (response.data \u0026\u0026 response.data.data) {\n        const rawRecords = response.data.data.records || [];\n        const total = response.data.data.total || 0;\n        const pages = Math.ceil(total / pageSize) || 1;\n        \n        console.log(\"原始记录数:\", rawRecords.length);\n        console.log(\"总记录数:\", total);\n        console.log(\"总页数:\", pages);\n        \n        setTotalCount(total);\n        setTotalPages(pages);\n        \n        // 检查每条记录的完整性\n        rawRecords.forEach((record: any, index: number) =\u003e {\n          if (!record.id || !record.title) {\n            console.warn(&#96;记录 #${index} 数据不完整:&#96;, record);\n          }\n        });\n        \n        // 处理视频数据\n        const videosData = rawRecords.map((video: Video, index: number) =\u003e {\n          console.log(&#96;处理视频 #${index}:&#96;, video);\n          \n          return {\n            ...video,\n            // 格式化时长为分钟\n            durationFormatted: formatDuration(video.duration),\n            // 格式化日期\n            uploadDateFormatted: formatDate(video.uploadDate)\n          };\n        });\n        \n        console.log(\"处理后的视频数据:\", videosData)\n        setVideos(videosData)\n      } else {\n        console.error(\"响应数据格式不正确:\", response)\n        toast({\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n          title: \"数据格式错误\",\n          description: \"获取到的视频数据格式不正确\",\n        })\n      }\n    }",

        "originalContents": " {\n    try {\n      setIsLoading(true)\n      console.log(\"开始获取视频列表数据，页码：\", page)\n      \n      const response = await videoApi.getVideos({\n        size: pageSize,\n        page: page\n      })\n      \n      console.log(\"获取视频列表响应:\", response)\n      \n      if (response.data \u0026\u0026 response.data.data) {\n        const rawRecords = response.data.data.records || [];\n        const total = response.data.data.total || 0;\n        const pages = Math.ceil(total / pageSize) || 1;\n        \n        console.log(\"原始记录数:\", rawRecords.length);\n        console.log(\"总记录数:\", total);\n        console.log(\"总页数:\", pages);\n        \n        setTotalCount(total);\n        setTotalPages(pages);\n        \n        // 检查每条记录的完整性\n        rawRecords.forEach((record: any, index: number) =\u003e {\n          if (!record.id || !record.title) {\n            console.warn(&#96;记录 #${index} 数据不完整:&#96;, record);\n          }\n        });\n        \n        // 处理视频数据\n        const videosData = rawRecords.map((video: Video, index: number) =\u003e {\n          console.log(&#96;处理视频 #${index}:&#96;, video);\n          \n          return {\n            ...video,\n            // 格式化时长为分钟\n            durationFormatted: formatDuration(video.duration),\n            // 格式化日期\n            uploadDateFormatted: formatDate(video.uploadDate)\n          };\n        });\n        \n        console.log(\"处理后的视频数据:\", videosData)\n        setVideos(videosData)\n      } else {\n        console.error(\"响应数据格式不正确:\", response)\n        toast({\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n          title: \"数据格式错误\",\n          description: \"获取到的视频数据格式不正确\",\n        })\n      }\n    }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideoDetailsPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\n...\nfunction VideoDetailsPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\r\n  const [video, setVideo] = useState\u003cVideo | null\u003e(null)\n...\n\u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\r\n          \u003ch1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight\"\u003e{video.title}\u003c/h1\u003e\r\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cBadge variant={video.status === \"published\" ? \"secondary\" : \"outline\"}\u003e\r\n              {video.status === \"published\" ? \"已发布\" : \"草稿\"}\r\n            \u003c/Badge\u003e\r\n            \u003cBadge variant={video.accessType === \"internal\" ? \"secondary\" : \"outline\"}\u003e\r\n              {video.accessType === \"internal\" ? \"会员专享\" : \"公开课程\"}\r\n            \u003c/Badge\u003e\r\n          \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n        \u003cdiv className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\"\u003e\r\n          \u003cCard className=\"md:col-span-2\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cCardHeader\u003e\r\n              \u003cCardTitle\u003e视频预览\u003c/CardTitle\u003e\r\n            \u003c/CardHeader\u003e\r\n            \u003cCardContent\u003e\r\n              \u003cdiv className=\"aspect-video bg-muted rounded-md overflow-hidden\"\u003e\r\n                {video.thumbnailUrl ? (\r\n                  \u003cimg \r\n                    src={video.thumbnailUrl} \r\n                    alt={video.title} \r\n                    className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\"\r\n                  /\u003e\r\n                ) : video.videoUrl ? (\r\n                  \u003cvideo \r\n                    src={video.videoUrl} \r\n                    controls \r\n                    poster=\"/placeholder.svg?height=400\u0026width=800\" \r\n                    className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\"\r\n                  \u003e\r\n                    您的浏览器不支持视频播放\r\n                  \u003c/video\u003e\r\n                ) : (\r\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cFilm className=\"h-12 w-12 mr-2\" /\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e无视频预览\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                )}\r\n              \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\r\n          \u003c/Card\u003e\r\n\r\n          ",

        "contents": "export function VideoForm({ videoId, onSuccess }: VideoFormProps) {\n...\nfunction VideoForm({ videoId, onSuccess }: VideoFormProps) {\r\n  const router = useRouter()\n...\n\u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6 md:col-span-1\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cFormItem\u003e\r\n              \u003cFormLabel\u003e视频文件\u003c/FormLabel\u003e\r\n              \u003cdiv className=\"mt-2\"\u003e\r\n                {videoPreview ?         "contents": "export function VideoForm({ videoId, onSuccess }: VideoFormProps) {\n...\nfunction VideoForm({ videoId, onSuccess }: VideoFormProps) {\r\n  const router = useRouter()\n ...\n (\r\n                  \u003cCard className=\"border-dashed\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cCardContent className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6\"\u003e\r\n                      \u003cUpload className=\"h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground mb-2\" /\u003e\r\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击选择或拖拽视频文件到这里\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1\"\u003e支持 MP4, WebM 格式，最大 500MB\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                      \u003cInput\r\n                        type=\"file\"\r\n                        className=\"hidden\"\r\n                        id=\"video-upload\"\r\n                        accept=\"video/mp4,video/webm\"\r\n                        onChange={handleVideoFileChange}\r\n                      /\u003e\r\n                      \u003cButton\r\n                        type=\"button\"\r\n                        variant=\"outline\"\r\n                        className=\"mt-4\"\r\n                        onClick={() =\u003e document.getElementById(\"video-upload\")?.click()}\r\n                      \u003e\r\n                        选择视频文件\r\n                      \u003c/Button\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/CardContent\u003e\r\n                  \u003c/Card\u003e\r\n                )}\r\n              \u003c/div\u003e\r\n              \u003cFormDescription\u003e上传高质量的视频文件，系统支持自动转码\u003c/FormDescription\u003e\r\n            \u003c/FormItem\u003e\r\n            \r\n            ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 视频数据接口定义\r\nexport interface Video {\r\n  id: number;\r\n  title: string;\r\n  description: string;\r\n  categoryId: number;\r\n  instructorId: number;\r\n  duration: number;\r\n  videoUrl: string;\r\n  thumbnailUrl: string;\r\n  accessType: string; // external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员\r\n  views: number;\r\n  status: string;\r\n  uploadDate: string;\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "// 视频数据接口定义\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "export interface Video {\r"

            "lineNumber": 3,

          },

            "lineNumber": 5,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "  duration: number;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  videoUrl: string;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  thumbnailUrl: string;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  accessType: string; // external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  views: number;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  status: string;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  uploadDate: string;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "// 视频数据接口定义\r\nexport interface Video {\r\n  id: number;\r\n  title: string;\r\n  description: string;\r\n  categoryId: number;\r\n  instructorId: number;\r\n  duration: number;\r\n  videoUrl: string;\r\n  thumbnailUrl: string;\r\n  accessType: string; // external:非会员可观看5分钟,internal:仅会员\r\n  views: number;\r\n  status: string;\r\n  uploadDate: string;\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 15
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/types/index.ts"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function AnalyticsPage() {\n...\nfunction AnalyticsPage() {\n  const [timeRange, setTimeRange] = useState(\"month\")\n...\nuseEffect(() =\u003e {\n...\n() =\u003e {\n    // 获取用户观看时间数据\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    // 获取视频播放时间数据\n    const fetchVideoPlayTime = async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        setLoading(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, videoPlayTime: true }))\n        console.log(\"开始获取视频播放时间数据...\")\n        const response = await statsApi.getAllVideoPlayTime()\n        console.log(\"视频播放时间数据原始返回:\", response)\n        \n        if (!response || !response.data) {\n          console.error(\"API返回数据为空或无效\")\n          return\n        }\n        \n        // 转换数据格式\n        const entries = Object.entries(response.data || {})\n        console.log(\"视频播放时间数据条目:\", entries)\n        \n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n          console.warn(\"视频播放时间数据为空\")\n          return\n        }\n        \n        const formattedData = entries.map(([videoId, playTime]) =\u003e {\n          console.log(&#96;处理视频 ${videoId}, 播放时间 ${playTime}&#96;)\n          return {\n            videoId: Number(videoId),\n            playTime: Number(playTime)\n          }\n        }).sort((a, b) =\u003e b.playTime - a.playTime) // 按播放时间降序排序\n        \n        console.log(\"格式化后的视频播放时间数据:\", formattedData)\n        setVideoPlayTimeData(formattedData)\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"获取视频播放时间数据失败:\", error)\n        // 出错时不更新状态，保持空数组\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, videoPlayTime: false }))\n      }\n    }\n\n    fetchUserWatchTime()\n    fetchVideoPlayTime()\n  }, [])\n  \n  // \"总览\"选项卡的模拟数据 - 仅用于展示\n  // 模拟数据 - 会员注册统计\n  const memberData = [\n    { name: \"1月\", 新会员: 65 },\n    { name: \"2月\", 新会员: 78 },\n    { name: \"3月\", 新会员: 90 },\n    { name: \"4月\", 新会员: 81 },\n    { name: \"5月\", 新会员: 95 },\n    { name: \"6月\", 新会员: 110 },\n    { name: \"7月\", 新会员: 120 },\n  ]",

        "originalContents": "\n\n    // 获取视频播放时间数据\n    const fetchVideoPlayTime = async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        setLoading(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, videoPlayTime: true }))\n        console.log(\"开始获取视频播放时间数据...\")\n        const response = await statsApi.getAllVideoPlayTime()\n        console.log(\"视频播放时间数据原始返回:\", response)\n        \n        if (!response || !response.data) {\n          console.error(\"API返回数据为空或无效\")\n          return\n        }\n        \n        // 转换数据格式\n        const entries = Object.entries(response.data || {})\n        console.log(\"视频播放时间数据条目:\", entries)\n        \n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n          console.warn(\"视频播放时间数据为空\")\n          return\n        }\n        \n        const formattedData = entries.map(([videoId, playTime]) =\u003e {\n          console.log(&#96;处理视频 ${videoId}, 播放时间 ${playTime}&#96;)\n          return {\n            videoId: Number(videoId),\n            playTime: Number(playTime)\n          }\n        }).sort((a, b) =\u003e b.playTime - a.playTime) // 按播放时间降序排序\n        \n        console.log(\"格式化后的视频播放时间数据:\", formattedData)\n        setVideoPlayTimeData(formattedData)\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"获取视频播放时间数据失败:\", error)\n        // 出错时不更新状态，保持空数组\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, videoPlayTime: false }))\n      }\n    }\n\n    fetchUserWatchTime()\n    fetchVideoPlayTime()\n  }, [])\n  \n  // \"总览\"选项卡的模拟数据 - 仅用于展示\n  // 模拟数据 - 会员注册统计\n  const memberData = [\n    { name: \"1月\", 新会员: 65 },\n    { name: \"2月\", 新会员: 78 },\n    { name: \"3月\", 新会员: 90 },\n    { name: \"4月\", 新会员: 81 },\n    { name: \"5月\", 新会员: 95 },\n    { name: \"6月\", 新会员: 110 },\n    { name: \"7月\", 新会员: 120 },\n  ]",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 145
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 89
          }
        },

      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            if (videoFile != null \u0026\u0026 !videoFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                String videoFileName = handleFileUpload(videoFile, VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setVideoUrl(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName);\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供时长，尝试从视频文件获取\r\n                if (duration == null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        duration = VideoUtils.getDuration(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频文件获取时长\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供缩略图，尝试从视频生成\r\n                if (thumbnailFile == null || thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        String thumbnailFileName = UUID.randomUUID().toString() + \".jpg\";\r\n                        File thumbnailFile1 = new File(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n                        VideoUtils.generateThumbnail(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName), thumbnailFile1);\r\n                        video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频生成缩略图\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 处理缩略图文件上传\r\n            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                String thumbnailFileName = handleFileUpload(thumbnailFile, THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置时长\r\n            video.setDuration(duration != null ? duration : 0);\r\n            \r\n            // 保存视频信息到数据库\r\n            videosService.save(video);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(video);",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            if (videoFile != null \u0026\u0026 !videoFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                String videoFileName = handleFileUpload(videoFile, VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setVideoUrl(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName);\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供时长，尝试从视频文件获取\r\n                if (duration == null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        duration = VideoUtils.getDuration(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频文件获取时长\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供缩略图，尝试从视频生成\r\n                if (thumbnailFile == null || thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        String thumbnailFileName = UUID.randomUUID().toString() + \".jpg\";\r\n                        File thumbnailFile1 = new File(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n                        VideoUtils.generateThumbnail(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName), thumbnailFile1);\r\n                        video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频生成缩略图\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 处理缩略图文件上传\r\n            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                String thumbnailFileName = handleFileUpload(thumbnailFile, THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置时长\r\n            video.setDuration(duration != null ? duration : 0);\r\n            \r\n            // 保存视频信息到数据库\r\n            videosService.save(video);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(video);",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\nexport default function VideoDetailsPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\r\n  const [video, setVideo] = useState\u003cVideo | null\u003e(null)\r\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\r\n  \r\n  // 获取视频数据\r\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n    async function fetchVideoData() {\r\n      try {\r\n        setIsLoading(true)\r\n        setError(null)\r\n        \r\n        const response = await videoApi.getVideoById(Number(params.id))\r\n        \r\n        if (response.data \u0026\u0026 response.data.data) {\r\n          setVideo(response.data.data)\r\n        } else {\r\n          setError(\"获取视频数据失败\")\r\n        }\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        console.error(\"获取视频数据错误\", err)\r\n        setError(\"无法加载视频，请稍后重试\")\r\n        toast({\r\n          variant: \"destructive\",\r\n          title: \"加载失败\",\r\n          description: \"无法获取视频数据，请稍后重试\",\r\n        })\r\n      } finally {\r\n        setIsLoading(false)\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    fetchVideoData()\r\n  }, [params.id])\r\n\r\n  // 格式化时长（秒转分钟）\r\n  const formatDuration = (seconds: number | undefined): string =\u003e {\r\n    if (!seconds) return \"0分钟\"\r\n    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60)\r\n    return &#96;${minutes}分钟&#96;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // 格式化日期\r\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string | undefined): string =\u003e {\r\n    if (!dateString) return \"\"\r\n    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN', {\r\n      year: 'numeric',\r\n      month: 'long',\r\n      day: 'numeric'\r\n    })\r\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 29,

          {
            "lineNumber": 49,

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\nexport default function VideoDetailsPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {\r\n  const [video, setVideo] = useState\u003cVideo | null\u003e(null)\r\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\r\n  \r\n  // 获取视频数据\r\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n    async function fetchVideoData() {\r\n      try {\r\n        setIsLoading(true)\r\n        setError(null)\r\n        \r\n        const response = await videoApi.getVideoById(Number(params.id))\r\n        \r\n        if (response.data \u0026\u0026 response.data.data) {\r\n          setVideo(response.data.data)\r\n        } else {\r\n          setError(\"获取视频数据失败\")\r\n        }\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        console.error(\"获取视频数据错误\", err)\r\n        setError(\"无法加载视频，请稍后重试\")\r\n        toast({\r\n          variant: \"destructive\",\r\n          title: \"加载失败\",\r\n          description: \"无法获取视频数据，请稍后重试\",\r\n        })\r\n      } finally {\r\n        setIsLoading(false)\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    fetchVideoData()\r\n  }, [params.id])\r\n\r\n  // 格式化时长（秒转分钟）\r\n  const formatDuration = (seconds: number | undefined): string =\u003e {\r\n    if (!seconds) return \"0分钟\"\r\n    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60)\r\n    return &#96;${minutes}分钟&#96;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // 格式化日期\r\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string | undefined): string =\u003e {\r\n    if (!dateString) return \"\"\r\n    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN', {\r\n      year: 'numeric',\r\n      month: 'long',\r\n      day: 'numeric'\r\n    })\r\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport type React from \"react\"\n\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Download } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { videoApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\n\n// 视频数据接口\ninterface Video {\n  id: number\n  title: string\n  description: string\n  duration: number\n  videoUrl: string\n  thumbnailUrl: string\n  instructorId: number\n  views: number\n  accessType: string\n  status: string\n  uploadDate: string\n  categoryId: number\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "\"use client\""

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import Link from \"next/link\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import { ArrowLeft, Download } from \"lucide-react\""
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "import { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\""
          },

            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\""
          },

            "text": "import { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "// 视频数据接口"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "interface Video {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  id: number"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  title: string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  description: string"
          },

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport type React from \"react\"\n\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Download } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { videoApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\n\n// 视频数据接口\ninterface Video {\n  id: number\n  title: string\n  description: string\n  duration: number\n  videoUrl: string\n  thumbnailUrl: string\n  instructorId: number\n  views: number\n  accessType: string\n  status: string\n  uploadDate: string\n  categoryId: number\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 31
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/app/video/[id]/page.tsx"
      },
      "score": 0.3964844048023224
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": " {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证视频是否存在\r\n            Videos video = videosService.getById(id);\r\n            if (video == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"视频不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 验证分类是否存在\r\n            if (videoCategoriesService.getById(categoryId) == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"所选分类不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新基本信息\r\n            video.setTitle(title);\r\n            video.setDescription(description);\r\n            video.setCategoryId(categoryId);\r\n            video.setInstructorId(instructorId);\r\n            video.setAccessType(accessType);\r\n            video.setStatus(status);\r\n            \r\n            // 处理视频文件更新\r\n            if (videoFile != null \u0026\u0026 !videoFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                // 如果之前有视频文件，删除\r\n                if (video.getVideoUrl() != null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getVideoUrl()));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"删除旧视频文件失败\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                String videoFileName = handleFileUpload(videoFile, VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setVideoUrl(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName);\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供时长，尝试从视频文件获取\r\n                if (duration == null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        duration = VideoUtils.getDuration(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频文件获取时长\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 处理缩略图文件更新",

        "originalContents": " {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证视频是否存在\r\n            Videos video = videosService.getById(id);\r\n            if (video == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"视频不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 验证分类是否存在\r\n            if (videoCategoriesService.getById(categoryId) == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"所选分类不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新基本信息\r\n            video.setTitle(title);\r\n            video.setDescription(description);\r\n            video.setCategoryId(categoryId);\r\n            video.setInstructorId(instructorId);\r\n            video.setAccessType(accessType);\r\n            video.setStatus(status);\r\n            \r\n            // 处理视频文件更新\r\n            if (videoFile != null \u0026\u0026 !videoFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                // 如果之前有视频文件，删除\r\n                if (video.getVideoUrl() != null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getVideoUrl()));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"删除旧视频文件失败\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                String videoFileName = handleFileUpload(videoFile, VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setVideoUrl(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName);\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供时长，尝试从视频文件获取\r\n                if (duration == null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        duration = VideoUtils.getDuration(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频文件获取时长\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 处理缩略图文件更新",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function VideosPage() {\n...\nfunction VideosPage() {\n  // 管理删除对话框\n...\nconst fetchVideos = async (page = currentPage) =\u003e {\n...\nfetchVideos = async (page = currentPage) =\u003e {\n ...\n catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"获取视频列表失败\", error)\n      toast({\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n        title: \"获取视频失败\",\n        description: \"无法获取视频列表，请稍后重试\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoading(false)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 格式化时长（秒转分钟）\n  const formatDuration = (seconds: number): string =\u003e {\n    if (!seconds) return \"0分钟\"\n    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60)\n    return &#96;${minutes}分钟&#96;\n  }\n\n  // 格式化日期\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string): string =\u003e {\n    if (!dateString) return \"\"\n    try {\n      const date = new Date(dateString)\n      return &#96;${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(\"日期格式化错误:\", e)\n      return dateString\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 确定访问类型\n  const getAccessType = (type: string): string =\u003e {\n    // 转换可能的不同格式的类型值为统一格式\n    const normalizedType = type?.toLowerCase();\n    \n    if (normalizedType === 'internal' || normalizedType === 'member' || normalizedType === 'vip') {\n      return 'internal'\n    }\n    return 'external'\n  }\n\n  // 展示状态标签\n  const getStatusLabel = (status: string): string =\u003e {\n    const normalizedStatus = status?.toLowerCase();\n    \n    if (normalizedStatus === 'published' || normalizedStatus === 'active') {\n      return '已发布'\n    } else if (normalizedStatus === 'draft') {\n      return '草稿'\n    } else {\n      return status || '未知状态'\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 处理页码变化\n  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) =\u003e {\n    if (newPage \u003e= 1 \u0026\u0026 newPage \u003c= totalPages) {\n      setCurrentPage(newPage)\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.util;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\n\r\nimport javax.imageio.ImageIO;\r\nimport java.awt.image.BufferedImage;\r\nimport java.io.File;\r\nimport java.io.IOException;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 视频处理工具类\r\n */\r\n@Slf4j\r\npublic class VideoUtils {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频时长（秒）\r\n     * 注意：实际项目中应使用ffmpeg或其他视频处理库，这里仅为示例\r\n     */\r\n    public static int getDuration(File videoFile) throws IOException {\r\n        // 实际项目中应该使用类似以下代码调用ffmpeg:\r\n        // ProcessBuilder pb = new ProcessBuilder(\"ffprobe\", \"-v\", \"error\", \"-show_entries\",\r\n        //         \"format=duration\", \"-of\", \"default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1\", videoFile.getAbsolutePath());\r\n        // Process p = pb.start();\r\n        // BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(p.getInputStream()));\r\n        // String line = br.readLine();\r\n        // return (int)Math.round(Double.parseDouble(line));\r\n        \r\n        // 由于未集成真实的视频处理库，这里返回模拟时长\r\n        // 根据文件大小模拟时长，实际应使用ffmpeg等库获取\r\n        long fileSizeInBytes = videoFile.length();\r\n        // 假设每MB约对应15秒视频（仅用于模拟）\r\n        int durationInSeconds = (int)(fileSizeInBytes / (1024 * 1024) * 15);\r\n        // 确保至少10秒\r\n        return Math.max(durationInSeconds, 10);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 从视频生成缩略图\r\n     * 注意：实际项目中应使用ffmpeg或其他视频处理库，这里仅为示例\r\n     */",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.util;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\n\r\nimport javax.imageio.ImageIO;\r\nimport java.awt.image.BufferedImage;\r\nimport java.io.File;\r\nimport java.io.IOException;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 视频处理工具类\r\n */\r\n@Slf4j\r\npublic class VideoUtils {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频时长（秒）\r\n     * 注意：实际项目中应使用ffmpeg或其他视频处理库，这里仅为示例\r\n     */\r\n    public static int getDuration(File videoFile) throws IOException {\r\n        // 实际项目中应该使用类似以下代码调用ffmpeg:\r\n        // ProcessBuilder pb = new ProcessBuilder(\"ffprobe\", \"-v\", \"error\", \"-show_entries\",\r\n        //         \"format=duration\", \"-of\", \"default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1\", videoFile.getAbsolutePath());\r\n        // Process p = pb.start();\r\n        // BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(p.getInputStream()));\r\n        // String line = br.readLine();\r\n        // return (int)Math.round(Double.parseDouble(line));\r\n        \r\n        // 由于未集成真实的视频处理库，这里返回模拟时长\r\n        // 根据文件大小模拟时长，实际应使用ffmpeg等库获取\r\n        long fileSizeInBytes = videoFile.length();\r\n        // 假设每MB约对应15秒视频（仅用于模拟）\r\n        int durationInSeconds = (int)(fileSizeInBytes / (1024 * 1024) * 15);\r\n        // 确保至少10秒\r\n        return Math.max(durationInSeconds, 10);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 从视频生成缩略图\r\n     * 注意：实际项目中应使用ffmpeg或其他视频处理库，这里仅为示例\r\n     */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 视频相关API\r\nexport const videoApi = {\r\n  getVideos: (params?: {\r\n    page?: number;\r\n    size?: number;\r\n    keyword?: string; \r\n    categoryId?: number;\r\n    accessType?: string;\r\n    status?: string;\r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();\r\n    \r\n    if (params?.page) queryParams.append('page', params.page.toString());\r\n    if (params?.size) queryParams.append('size', params.size.toString());\r\n    if (params?.keyword) queryParams.append('keyword', params.keyword);\r\n    if (params?.categoryId) queryParams.append('categoryId', params.categoryId.toString());\r\n    if (params?.accessType) queryParams.append('accessType', params.accessType);\r\n    if (params?.status) queryParams.append('status', params.status);\r\n    \r\n    const queryString = queryParams.toString() ? &#96;?${queryParams.toString()}&#96; : '';\r\n    console.log(&#96;请求视频列表API: /api/videos${queryString}&#96;);\r\n    return api.get(&#96;/api/videos${queryString}&#96;);\r\n  },\r\n  getVideoById: (id: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;),\r\n  createVideo: (formData: FormData) =\u003e api.post('/api/videos', formData, {\r\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' }\r\n  }),\r\n  updateVideo: (id: number, formData: FormData) =\u003e api.put(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;, formData, {\r\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' }\r\n  }),\r\n  deleteVideo: (id: number) =\u003e api.delete(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;),\r\n  getVideoStats: (id: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${id}/stats&#96;),\r\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 视频相关API\r\nexport const videoApi = {\r\n  getVideos: (params?: {\r\n    page?: number;\r\n    size?: number;\r\n    keyword?: string; \r\n    categoryId?: number;\r\n    accessType?: string;\r\n    status?: string;\r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();\r\n    \r\n    if (params?.page) queryParams.append('page', params.page.toString());\r\n    if (params?.size) queryParams.append('size', params.size.toString());\r\n    if (params?.keyword) queryParams.append('keyword', params.keyword);\r\n    if (params?.categoryId) queryParams.append('categoryId', params.categoryId.toString());\r\n    if (params?.accessType) queryParams.append('accessType', params.accessType);\r\n    if (params?.status) queryParams.append('status', params.status);\r\n    \r\n    const queryString = queryParams.toString() ? &#96;?${queryParams.toString()}&#96; : '';\r\n    console.log(&#96;请求视频列表API: /api/videos${queryString}&#96;);\r\n    return api.get(&#96;/api/videos${queryString}&#96;);\r\n  },\r\n  getVideoById: (id: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;),\r\n  createVideo: (formData: FormData) =\u003e api.post('/api/videos', formData, {\r\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' }\r\n  }),\r\n  updateVideo: (id: number, formData: FormData) =\u003e api.put(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;, formData, {\r\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' }\r\n  }),\r\n  deleteVideo: (id: number) =\u003e api.delete(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;),\r\n  getVideoStats: (id: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${id}/stats&#96;),\r\n};",

        "contents": "\n\n// 视频接口定义\ninterface Video {\n  id: number;\n  title: string;\n  description: string;\n  duration: number; // 秒数\n  videoUrl: string;\n  thumbnailUrl: string;\n  instructorId: number;\n  views: number;\n  accessType: string;\n  status: string;\n  uploadDate: string;\n  instructorName?: string;\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n// 视频接口定义\ninterface Video {\n  id: number;\n  title: string;\n  description: string;\n  duration: number; // 秒数\n  videoUrl: string;\n  thumbnailUrl: string;\n  instructorId: number;\n  views: number;\n  accessType: string;\n  status: string;\n  uploadDate: string;\n  instructorName?: string;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                // 如果之前有缩略图文件，删除\r\n                if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"删除旧缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                String thumbnailFileName = handleFileUpload(thumbnailFile, THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新时长（如果提供）\r\n            if (duration != null) {\r\n                video.setDuration(duration);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新视频信息到数据库\r\n            videosService.updateById(video);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(video);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"更新视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"更新视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 删除视频\r\n     */",

          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "     * 删除视频\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "     */"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                // 如果之前有缩略图文件，删除\r\n                if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"删除旧缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                String thumbnailFileName = handleFileUpload(thumbnailFile, THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新时长（如果提供）\r\n            if (duration != null) {\r\n                video.setDuration(duration);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新视频信息到数据库\r\n            videosService.updateById(video);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(video);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"更新视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"更新视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 删除视频\r\n     */",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @DeleteMapping(\"/{id}\")\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e delete(@PathVariable Integer id) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证视频是否存在\r\n            Videos video = videosService.getById(id);\r\n            if (video == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"视频不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除视频文件\r\n            if (video.getVideoUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getVideoUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除视频文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除缩略图文件\r\n            if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 从数据库删除视频记录\r\n            boolean result = videosService.removeById(id);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(result);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"删除视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"删除视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频观看信息\r\n     */",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @DeleteMapping(\"/{id}\")\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e delete(@PathVariable Integer id) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证视频是否存在\r\n            Videos video = videosService.getById(id);\r\n            if (video == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"视频不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除视频文件\r\n            if (video.getVideoUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getVideoUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除视频文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除缩略图文件\r\n            if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 从数据库删除视频记录\r\n            boolean result = videosService.removeById(id);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(result);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"删除视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"删除视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频观看信息\r\n     */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { Clock, Play, Tag } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\"\n\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { videoApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { ApiResponse, PaginatedResponse, Video } from \"@/types\"\nimport { formatDuration } from \"@/lib/utils\"\nimport { getCategoryNameById } from \"@/lib/category-utils\"\n\n// 这个组件负责展示首页热门课程\nexport default function FeaturedVideos() {\n  const [featuredVideos, setFeaturedVideos] = useState\u003cVideo[]\u003e([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const fetchFeaturedVideos = async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        // 获取状态为\"推荐\"的视频，限制4个\n        const response = await videoApi.getVideos({\n          page: 1,\n          size: 4,\n          status: \"published\"\n        });\n        \n        const apiResponse = response.data as ApiResponse\u003cPaginatedResponse\u003cVideo\u003e\u003e;\n        if (apiResponse.code === 200 \u0026\u0026 apiResponse.data.records) {\n          setFeaturedVideos(apiResponse.data.records);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error('获取推荐视频失败:', error);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchFeaturedVideos();\n  }, []);",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "export default function FeaturedVideos() {"

        "originalContents": "'use client';\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { Clock, Play, Tag } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\"\n\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { videoApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { ApiResponse, PaginatedResponse, Video } from \"@/types\"\nimport { formatDuration } from \"@/lib/utils\"\nimport { getCategoryNameById } from \"@/lib/category-utils\"\n\n// 这个组件负责展示首页热门课程\nexport default function FeaturedVideos() {\n  const [featuredVideos, setFeaturedVideos] = useState\u003cVideo[]\u003e([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const fetchFeaturedVideos = async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        // 获取状态为\"推荐\"的视频，限制4个\n        const response = await videoApi.getVideos({\n          page: 1,\n          size: 4,\n          status: \"published\"\n        });\n        \n        const apiResponse = response.data as ApiResponse\u003cPaginatedResponse\u003cVideo\u003e\u003e;\n        if (apiResponse.code === 200 \u0026\u0026 apiResponse.data.records) {\n          setFeaturedVideos(apiResponse.data.records);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error('获取推荐视频失败:', error);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchFeaturedVideos();\n  }, []);",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function VideoForm({ videoId, onSuccess }: VideoFormProps) {\n...\nfunction VideoForm({ videoId, onSuccess }: VideoFormProps) {\r\n  const router = useRouter()\n\r\n\r\n  ...\n\r\n\r\n  // 提交表单\r\n  const onSubmit = async (data: VideoFormValues) =\u003e {\r\n    try {\r\n      setIsLoading(true)\r\n      \r\n      // 创建FormData实例用于文件上传\r\n      const formData = new FormData()\r\n      formData.append(\"title\", data.title)\r\n      formData.append(\"description\", data.description)\r\n      formData.append(\"categoryId\", data.categoryId)\r\n      formData.append(\"instructorId\", data.instructorId)\r\n      formData.append(\"accessType\", data.accessType)\r\n      formData.append(\"status\", data.status)\r\n      \r\n      if (data.duration) {\r\n        formData.append(\"duration\", data.duration.toString())\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      if (data.videoFile) {\r\n        formData.append(\"videoFile\", data.videoFile)\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      if (data.thumbnailFile) {\r\n        formData.append(\"thumbnailFile\", data.thumbnailFile)\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      if (videoId) {\r\n        // 更新现有视频\r\n        // await videoApi.updateVideo(videoId, formData)\r\n        console.log(\"更新视频数据\", formData)\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: \"视频更新成功\",\r\n          description: \"视频信息已成功更新\",\r\n        })\r\n      } else {\r\n        // 创建新视频\r\n        // await videoApi.createVideo(formData)\r\n        console.log(\"创建新视频\", formData)\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: \"视频创建成功\",\r\n          description: \"新视频已成功上传到系统\",\r\n        })\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      // 调用成功回调或跳转\r\n      if (onSuccess) {\r\n        onSuccess()\r\n      } else {\r\n        router.push(\"/admin/videos\")\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n      console.error(\"提交视频表单失败\", error)\r\n      toast({\r\n        variant: \"destructive\",\r\n        title: \"操作失败\",\r\n        description: videoId ? \"更新视频失败，请重试\" : \"上传视频失败，请重试\",\r\n      })\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setIsLoading(false)\r\n    }\r\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n  // 提交表单\r\n  const onSubmit = async (data: VideoFormValues) =\u003e {\r\n    try {\r\n      setIsLoading(true)\r\n      \r\n      // 创建FormData实例用于文件上传\r\n      const formData = new FormData()\r\n      formData.append(\"title\", data.title)\r\n      formData.append(\"description\", data.description)\r\n      formData.append(\"categoryId\", data.categoryId)\r\n      formData.append(\"instructorId\", data.instructorId)\r\n      formData.append(\"accessType\", data.accessType)\r\n      formData.append(\"status\", data.status)\r\n      \r\n      if (data.duration) {\r\n        formData.append(\"duration\", data.duration.toString())\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      if (data.videoFile) {\r\n        formData.append(\"videoFile\", data.videoFile)\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      if (data.thumbnailFile) {\r\n        formData.append(\"thumbnailFile\", data.thumbnailFile)\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      if (videoId) {\r\n        // 更新现有视频\r\n        // await videoApi.updateVideo(videoId, formData)\r\n        console.log(\"更新视频数据\", formData)\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: \"视频更新成功\",\r\n          description: \"视频信息已成功更新\",\r\n        })\r\n      } else {\r\n        // 创建新视频\r\n        // await videoApi.createVideo(formData)\r\n        console.log(\"创建新视频\", formData)\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: \"视频创建成功\",\r\n          description: \"新视频已成功上传到系统\",\r\n        })\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      // 调用成功回调或跳转\r\n      if (onSuccess) {\r\n        onSuccess()\r\n      } else {\r\n        router.push(\"/admin/videos\")\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n      console.error(\"提交视频表单失败\", error)\r\n      toast({\r\n        variant: \"destructive\",\r\n        title: \"操作失败\",\r\n        description: videoId ? \"更新视频失败，请重试\" : \"上传视频失败，请重试\",\r\n      })\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setIsLoading(false)\r\n    }\r\n  }",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 视频相关API\r\nexport const videoApi = {\r\n  getVideos: (params?: {\r\n    page?: number;\r\n    size?: number;\r\n    keyword?: string; \r\n    categoryId?: number;\r\n    accessType?: string;\r\n    status?: string;\r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();\r\n    \r\n    if (params?.page) queryParams.append('page', params.page.toString());\r\n    if (params?.size) queryParams.append('size', params.size.toString());\r\n    if (params?.keyword) queryParams.append('keyword', params.keyword);\r\n    if (params?.categoryId) queryParams.append('categoryId', params.categoryId.toString());\r\n    if (params?.accessType) queryParams.append('accessType', params.accessType);\r\n    if (params?.status) queryParams.append('status', params.status);\r\n    \r\n    const queryString = queryParams.toString() ? &#96;?${queryParams.toString()}&#96; : '';\r\n    console.log(&#96;请求视频列表API: /api/videos${queryString}&#96;);\r\n    return api.get(&#96;/api/videos${queryString}&#96;);\r\n  },\r\n  getVideoById: (id: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;),\r\n  createVideo: (formData: FormData) =\u003e api.post('/api/videos', formData, {\r\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' }\r\n  }),\r\n  updateVideo: (id: number, formData: FormData) =\u003e api.put(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;, formData, {\r\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' }\r\n  }),\r\n  deleteVideo: (id: number) =\u003e api.delete(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;),\r\n  getVideoStats: (id: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${id}/stats&#96;),\r\n};",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 评论相关 API\r\nexport const commentApi = {\r\n  getComments: (videoId: number) =\u003e api.get(&#96;/api/videos/${videoId}/comments&#96;),\r\n  createComment: (videoId: number, data: { content: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/videos/${videoId}/comments&#96;, data),\r\n  deleteComment: (commentId: number) =\u003e api.delete(&#96;/api/comments/${commentId}&#96;),\r\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/videos\")\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\n@Slf4j\r\npublic class VideosController {\r\n\r\n    private final VideosService videosService;\r\n    private final VideoCategoriesService videoCategoriesService;\r\n    \r\n    // 视频文件存储路径\r\n    private static final String VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR = \"/uploads/videos/\";\r\n    // 缩略图文件存储路径\r\n    private static final String THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR = \"/uploads/thumbnails/\";\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频列表（分页）\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cPage\u003cVideos\u003e\u003e list(\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"page\", defaultValue = \"1\") int page,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"keyword\", required = false) String keyword,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"categoryId\", required = false) Integer categoryId,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"accessType\", required = false) String accessType,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"status\", required = false) String status)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "@RestController\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "@RequestMapping(\"/api/videos\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "@RequiredArgsConstructor\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "@Slf4j\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "public class VideosController {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    private final VideosService videosService;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    private final VideoCategoriesService videoCategoriesService;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    // 视频文件存储路径\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    private static final String VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR = \"/uploads/videos/\";\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    private static final String THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR = \"/uploads/thumbnails/\";\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "     * 获取视频列表（分页）\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 51,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    @GetMapping\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "            @RequestParam(value = \"page\", defaultValue = \"1\") int page,\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 55,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "            @RequestParam(value = \"status\", required = false) String status)"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/videos\")\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\n@Slf4j\r\npublic class VideosController {\r\n\r\n    private final VideosService videosService;\r\n    private final VideoCategoriesService videoCategoriesService;\r\n    \r\n    // 视频文件存储路径\r\n    private static final String VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR = \"/uploads/videos/\";\r\n    // 缩略图文件存储路径\r\n    private static final String THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR = \"/uploads/thumbnails/\";\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频列表（分页）\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cPage\u003cVideos\u003e\u003e list(\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"page\", defaultValue = \"1\") int page,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"keyword\", required = false) String keyword,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"categoryId\", required = false) Integer categoryId,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"accessType\", required = false) String accessType,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"status\", required = false) String status)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 77,
            "line": 59
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 34
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @DeleteMapping(\"/{id}\")\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e delete(@PathVariable Integer id) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证视频是否存在\r\n            Videos video = videosService.getById(id);\r\n            if (video == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"视频不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除视频文件\r\n            if (video.getVideoUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getVideoUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除视频文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除缩略图文件\r\n            if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 从数据库删除视频记录\r\n            boolean result = videosService.removeById(id);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(result);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"删除视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"删除视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频观看信息\r\n     */",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @DeleteMapping(\"/{id}\")\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cBoolean\u003e delete(@PathVariable Integer id) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证视频是否存在\r\n            Videos video = videosService.getById(id);\r\n            if (video == null) {\r\n                return ApiResponse.badRequest(\"视频不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除视频文件\r\n            if (video.getVideoUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getVideoUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除视频文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 删除缩略图文件\r\n            if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"删除缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 从数据库删除视频记录\r\n            boolean result = videosService.removeById(id);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(result);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"删除视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"删除视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取视频观看信息\r\n     */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function AdminDashboard() {\n...\nfunction AdminDashboard() {\n  const pageSize = 5;\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 获取热门视频\n  const fetchPopularVideos = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setVideoLoading(true);\n      \n      // 从localStorage获取token\n      const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n      if (!token) {\n        router.push('/login');\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 调用热门视频API - 修改为正确的API路径\n      const response = await api.get(\"/api/videos\", {\n        params: {\n          page: 1,\n          size: 5,\n          sort: 'views,desc' // 按观看次数排序\n        }\n      });\n      \n      // 设置热门视频数据\n      console.log(\"热门视频API响应:\", response);\n      \n      if (response.data \u0026\u0026 response.data.data) {\n        const rawRecords = response.data.data.records || [];\n        console.log(\"热门视频原始数据:\", rawRecords);\n        \n        // 处理视频数据\n        const videosData = rawRecords.map((video: Video) =\u003e ({\n          ...video,\n          // 转换为前端需要的格式\n          completionRate: \"70%\" // 假设完成率数据，实际应从后端获取\n        }));\n        \n        setPopularVideos(videosData);\n      } \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      if (error.response?.status === 401) {\n        // 未授权，跳转到登录页\n        router.push('/login');\n      }\n      console.error(\"获取热门视频失败\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setVideoLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // 格式化时长（秒转分钟）\n  const formatDuration = (seconds: number): string =\u003e {\n    if (!seconds) return \"0分钟\";\n    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n    return &#96;${minutes}分钟&#96;;\n  }\n\n  // 格式化日期\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string): string =\u003e {\n    if (!dateString) return \"\";\n    try {\n      const date = new Date(dateString);\n      return &#96;${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(\"日期格式化错误:\", e);\n      return dateString;\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 获取热门视频\n  const fetchPopularVideos = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setVideoLoading(true);\n      \n      // 从localStorage获取token\n      const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n      if (!token) {\n        router.push('/login');\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 调用热门视频API - 修改为正确的API路径\n      const response = await api.get(\"/api/videos\", {\n        params: {\n          page: 1,\n          size: 5,\n          sort: 'views,desc' // 按观看次数排序\n        }\n      });\n      \n      // 设置热门视频数据\n      console.log(\"热门视频API响应:\", response);\n      \n      if (response.data \u0026\u0026 response.data.data) {\n        const rawRecords = response.data.data.records || [];\n        console.log(\"热门视频原始数据:\", rawRecords);\n        \n        // 处理视频数据\n        const videosData = rawRecords.map((video: Video) =\u003e ({\n          ...video,\n          // 转换为前端需要的格式\n          completionRate: \"70%\" // 假设完成率数据，实际应从后端获取\n        }));\n        \n        setPopularVideos(videosData);\n      } \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      if (error.response?.status === 401) {\n        // 未授权，跳转到登录页\n        router.push('/login');\n      }\n      console.error(\"获取热门视频失败\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setVideoLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // 格式化时长（秒转分钟）\n  const formatDuration = (seconds: number): string =\u003e {\n    if (!seconds) return \"0分钟\";\n    const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n    return &#96;${minutes}分钟&#96;;\n  }\n\n  // 格式化日期\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string): string =\u003e {\n    if (!dateString) return \"\";\n    try {\n      const date = new Date(dateString);\n      return &#96;${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(\"日期格式化错误:\", e);\n      return dateString;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                // 如果之前有缩略图文件，删除\r\n                if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"删除旧缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                String thumbnailFileName = handleFileUpload(thumbnailFile, THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新时长（如果提供）\r\n            if (duration != null) {\r\n                video.setDuration(duration);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新视频信息到数据库\r\n            videosService.updateById(video);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(video);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"更新视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"更新视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 删除视频\r\n     */",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                // 如果之前有缩略图文件，删除\r\n                if (video.getThumbnailUrl() != null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        Files.deleteIfExists(Paths.get(video.getThumbnailUrl()));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"删除旧缩略图文件失败\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                String thumbnailFileName = handleFileUpload(thumbnailFile, THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新时长（如果提供）\r\n            if (duration != null) {\r\n                video.setDuration(duration);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新视频信息到数据库\r\n            videosService.updateById(video);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(video);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"更新视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"更新视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 删除视频\r\n     */",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport type React from \"react\"\n\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Download } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { videoApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\n\n// 视频数据接口\ninterface Video {\n  id: number\n  title: string\n  description: string\n  duration: number\n  videoUrl: string\n  thumbnailUrl: string\n  instructorId: number\n  views: number\n  accessType: string\n  status: string\n  uploadDate: string\n  categoryId: number\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport type React from \"react\"\n\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Download } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { videoApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\n\n// 视频数据接口\ninterface Video {\n  id: number\n  title: string\n  description: string\n  duration: number\n  videoUrl: string\n  thumbnailUrl: string\n  instructorId: number\n  views: number\n  accessType: string\n  status: string\n  uploadDate: string\n  categoryId: number\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n@Configuration\r\n@EnableWebSecurity\r\npublic class SecurityConfig extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint;\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {\r\n        http\r\n            // 禁用CSRF，因为我们使用token，不需要CSRF\r\n            .csrf().disable()\r\n            // 启用CORS\r\n            .cors().and()\r\n            // 不需要session\r\n            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS).and()\r\n            // 未授权异常处理\r\n            .exceptionHandling().authenticationEntryPoint(jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint).and()\r\n            // 请求授权\r\n            .authorizeRequests()\r\n            // 允许所有Options请求（预检请求）\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/**/auth/**\", \"/error\").permitAll()\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/videos/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问视频相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/categories/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问分类相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/callback/**\").permitAll() // 允许支付回调\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/admin/**\").hasRole(\"ADMIN\") // 管理员API需要ADMIN角色\r\n            // 其他所有请求需要认证\r\n            .anyRequest().authenticated()\r\n            // 关闭默认httpBasic认证\r\n            .and().httpBasic().disable();\r\n        \r\n        // 添加JWT过滤器\r\n        http.addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 跨域配置\r\n     */",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n@Configuration\r\n@EnableWebSecurity\r\npublic class SecurityConfig extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint;\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {\r\n        http\r\n            // 禁用CSRF，因为我们使用token，不需要CSRF\r\n            .csrf().disable()\r\n            // 启用CORS\r\n            .cors().and()\r\n            // 不需要session\r\n            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS).and()\r\n            // 未授权异常处理\r\n            .exceptionHandling().authenticationEntryPoint(jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint).and()\r\n            // 请求授权\r\n            .authorizeRequests()\r\n            // 允许所有Options请求（预检请求）\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/**/auth/**\", \"/error\").permitAll()\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/videos/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问视频相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/categories/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问分类相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/callback/**\").permitAll() // 允许支付回调\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/admin/**\").hasRole(\"ADMIN\") // 管理员API需要ADMIN角色\r\n            // 其他所有请求需要认证\r\n            .anyRequest().authenticated()\r\n            // 关闭默认httpBasic认证\r\n            .and().httpBasic().disable();\r\n        \r\n        // 添加JWT过滤器\r\n        http.addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 跨域配置\r\n     */",

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.conditions.query.QueryWrapper;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.pagination.Page;\r\nimport com.example.demo.common.ApiResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.VideoDTO;\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Videos;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.VideoCategoriesService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.VideosService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.util.VideoUtils;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.MediaType;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;\r\n\r\nimport java.io.File;\r\nimport java.nio.file.Files;\r\nimport java.nio.file.Path;\r\nimport java.nio.file.Paths;\r\nimport java.nio.file.StandardCopyOption;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport java.util.UUID;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.conditions.query.QueryWrapper;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.pagination.Page;\r\nimport com.example.demo.common.ApiResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.VideoDTO;\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Videos;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.VideoCategoriesService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.VideosService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.util.VideoUtils;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.MediaType;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;\r\n\r\nimport java.io.File;\r\nimport java.nio.file.Files;\r\nimport java.nio.file.Path;\r\nimport java.nio.file.Paths;\r\nimport java.nio.file.StandardCopyOption;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport java.util.UUID;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 视频表 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"创建视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新视频信息\r\n     */\r\n    @PutMapping(value = \"/{id}\", consumes = MediaType.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA_VALUE)\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cVideos\u003e update(\r\n            @PathVariable Integer id,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"title\") String title,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"description\") String description,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"categoryId\") Integer categoryId,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"instructorId\") Integer instructorId,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"accessType\") String accessType,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"status\") String status,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"duration\", required = false) Integer duration,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"videoFile\", required = false) MultipartFile videoFile,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"thumbnailFile\", required = false) MultipartFile thumbnailFile)",

            "text": "    /**\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建视频失败\", e);\r\n            return ApiResponse.internalError(\"创建视频失败: \" + e.getMessage());\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新视频信息\r\n     */\r\n    @PutMapping(value = \"/{id}\", consumes = MediaType.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA_VALUE)\r\n    public ApiResponse\u003cVideos\u003e update(\r\n            @PathVariable Integer id,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"title\") String title,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"description\") String description,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"categoryId\") Integer categoryId,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"instructorId\") Integer instructorId,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"accessType\") String accessType,\r\n            @RequestParam(\"status\") String status,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"duration\", required = false) Integer duration,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"videoFile\", required = false) MultipartFile videoFile,\r\n            @RequestParam(value = \"thumbnailFile\", required = false) MultipartFile thumbnailFile)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            if (videoFile != null \u0026\u0026 !videoFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                String videoFileName = handleFileUpload(videoFile, VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setVideoUrl(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName);\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供时长，尝试从视频文件获取\r\n                if (duration == null) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        duration = VideoUtils.getDuration(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName));\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频文件获取时长\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 如果未提供缩略图，尝试从视频生成\r\n                if (thumbnailFile == null || thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        String thumbnailFileName = UUID.randomUUID().toString() + \".jpg\";\r\n                        File thumbnailFile1 = new File(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n                        VideoUtils.generateThumbnail(new File(VIDEO_UPLOAD_DIR + videoFileName), thumbnailFile1);\r\n                        video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法从视频生成缩略图\", e);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 处理缩略图文件上传\r\n            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r\n                String thumbnailFileName = handleFileUpload(thumbnailFile, THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR);\r\n                video.setThumbnailUrl(THUMBNAIL_UPLOAD_DIR + thumbnailFileName);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置时长\r\n            video.setDuration(duration != null ? duration : 0);\r\n            \r\n            // 保存视频信息到数据库\r\n            videosService.save(video);\r\n            \r\n            return ApiResponse.success(video);",

            "text": "            if (thumbnailFile != null \u0026\u0026 !thumbnailFile.isEmpty()) {\r"
